commands.review_summary:
This PR adds managed npm-root stale `openclaw` cleanup before npm plugin installs, reuses recorded npm roots during updates, narrows beta fallback, and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. not as a high-confidence live reproduction in this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main can leave stale root `openclaw` state in the managed npm root and can fall back from real beta npm install failures, and the PR adds focused regression coverage for that path.
